content: The difference in intrinsic reward signal quality between ICM, RND, and general curious agents can be redefined by the long-term memory retention structure of 2024–2025 SOTA active learning agents, where under-explored state representations in curiosity-driven RL act identically to unlabeled data points in active learning that the agent’s memory system prioritizes retaining for future intrinsic reward gain.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
